name: HNS_VEH_INC_EVENT_SUMMARY
description: HNS_VEH_INC_EVENT_SUMMARY. This table stores vehicle incident event related summary data.

columns.Name: VEH_INC_EVT_SUMMARY_ID
columns.Comments: VEH_INC_EVT_SUMMARY_ID unique identifier. Primary key for HNS_VEH_INC_EVENT_SUMMARY table.

columns.Name: INCIDENT_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Incident Detail identifier. Foreign key for HNS_INCIDENTS_DETAIL table.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_STRUCK_CODE
columns.Comments: Vehicle Struck code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_VEHICLE_STRUCK.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_COLLISION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Vehicle Collision Type code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_COLLISION_TYPE.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_STRUCK_BY_CODE
columns.Comments: Vehicle Struck by code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_VEHICLE_STRUCK_BY.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_ACC_CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Vehicle Accident Category code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_ACCIDENT_CATEGORY.

columns.Name: TRAFFIC_CONTROLS_CODE
columns.Comments: Traffic Controls code. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_TRAFFIC_CONTROLS.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_SPEED_LIMIT
columns.Comments: Vehicle Speed Limit.

columns.Name: VEHICLE_SPEED_UNIT_CD
columns.Comments: Unit of measurement for Vehicle Speed. Lookup from FND_LOOKUP.ORA_HNS_SPEED_UOM.

columns.Name: POLICE_REPORT_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column signifies whether the Police Agency has been notified.

columns.Name: POLICE_AGENCY_LOCATION
columns.Comments: Police Agency Location.

columns.Name: POLICE_BADGE_NUM
columns.Comments: Police Badge Number.

columns.Name: CITATION_NUM
columns.Comments: Citation Number.

columns.Name: ROAD_CONDITION_CODE
columns.Comments: Road condition type identifier.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP ROAD CONDITION.

columns.Name: LIGHT_CONDITION_CODE
columns.Comments: Light condition type identifier.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP LIGHT_CONDITION.

columns.Name: TRAFFIC_CONDITION_CODE
columns.Comments: Traffic condition type identifier.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP TRAFFIC CONDITION.

columns.Name: WEATHER_CONDITION_CODE
columns.Comments: Weather condition type identifier.Lookup from FND_LOOKUP WEATHER CONDITION.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Deleted flag.This column signifies whether the Vehicle incident event is checked for deletion.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
